title: At BRICS Summit, Xi Jinping Says China's Economy Is Resilient
description: China's leader Xi Jinping told the BRICS group on Tuesday that China's economy was resilient and that the fundamentals for its long-term growth remained unchang...
snippet:
The giant ship of the Chinese economy will continue to ride the wind, Xi Jinping said at BRICS summit.
